schema.description: Extracts structured fields from inbound job application emails

role_applied_for.description: Job title or position the candidate is applying for

years_of_experience.description: Total years of relevant professional experience as a number

current_company.description: Candidate's current or most recent employer

current_title.description: Candidate's current or most recent job title

skills.description: Technical skills, languages, frameworks, or tools the candidate mentions (e.g. Python, React, PostgreSQL, AWS)

education.description: Highest level of education or degree mentioned (e.g. 'BS Computer Science, MIT')

availability.description: When the candidate is available to start (e.g. 'immediately', '2 weeks notice', 'March 1')

desired_salary.description: Desired salary or compensation range if mentioned

remote_preference.description: Candidate's stated preference for remote or in-office work

portfolio_url.description: URL to portfolio, GitHub, LinkedIn, or personal website if mentioned

has_resume_attached.description: Whether the email mentions or appears to include a resume attachment

cover_letter_summary.description: One to two sentence summary of why the candidate says they are a good fit
